policies.title: Bug Report Handling
policies.content: Bug reports triaged within 24 hours. P0 (service down): 1-hour response, 4-hour resolution target. P1 (major feature broken): 4-hour response, 24-hour resolution. P2 (minor issues): 48-hour response. Status updates via email and status page.

policies.title: API Rate Limits
policies.content: Rate limits: Starter 100 req/min, Business 1000 req/min, Enterprise 10000 req/min. Rate limit headers included in all responses (X-RateLimit-Remaining). Exceeded limits return 429 with Retry-After header. Temporary limit increases available for Enterprise.

policies.title: Webhook Configuration
policies.content: Webhooks require HTTPS endpoints. Retry policy: 3 attempts with exponential backoff (1min, 5min, 30min). Failed webhooks logged in Developer Console. Webhook secrets rotatable without downtime. Test webhook endpoint available in sandbox mode.

policies.title: Feature Requests
policies.content: Feature requests logged and reviewed monthly by product team. Popular requests (100+ votes) prioritized in roadmap. Enterprise customers can submit requests via dedicated CSM. No SLA on feature delivery but acknowledgment within 5 business days.
